column1: Have a look! Something black_____________in the snow. (LIE)

- I am ill.

- How long____________you___________this high temperature? - For three days. (HAVE)
Last Sunday they___________fishing. They__________in a tent and___________meals on a camp fire. (GO/SLEEP/COOK)
He_____________what the teacher said because he______________about something else. (NOT HEAR/THINK)
A Ticket is a small piece of paper that__________that you___________for a flight. (SHOW/PAY)
You use verbs in the present continuous tense when you___________to talk about something that_____________right now. (WANT/HAPPEN)
I could not sleep, so I__________up and________downstairs. (GET/GO)
Once an old man went to the river. He________________all day long and got tired. Suddenly his axe___________from his hand and________into the water. (WORK/SLIP/FALL)
I____________her the letter as soon as she__________. (GIVE/ARRIVE)
Jerry_________up early. He shaved, dressed and__________to the kitchen. (GET/GO)
